requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (ZWS / IEC 60335-2-24 via SAZ)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（经SAZ采用的ZWS / IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（經SAZ採用的ZWS / IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances supplied to the Zimbabwe market are expected to meet the electrical safety requirements of the IEC 60335 series — IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers) read with IEC 60335-1 (general requirements). The Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) is the national standards body and develops ZWS standards, which are commonly adopted from or aligned with IEC and South African SANS standards (SANS 60335 series mirrors IEC 60335). Conformity is demonstrated through SAZ conformity assessment / product testing, and regulated imports may be subject to import conformity inspection before clearance. The appliance must be rated for the local supply of 230 V single-phase, 50 Hz; rating plates, earthing arrangements, and plug/socket type (Zimbabwe uses BS 1363 13 A and round-pin types) must suit local installation. Key technical requirements mirror IEC: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength, earthing continuity, and marking.
summary.zh: 供应津巴布韦市场的家用制冷器具应满足IEC 60335系列的电气安全要求——IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）须与IEC 60335-1（通用要求）结合使用。津巴布韦标准协会（SAZ）为国家标准机构，制定ZWS标准，通常采用或对齐IEC及南非SANS标准（SANS 60335系列与IEC 60335一致）。符合性通过SAZ合格评定/产品检测证明，受监管的进口产品在清关前可能须接受进口符合性检验。器具须按本地230 V单相、50 Hz供电额定；铭牌、接地方式及插头/插座类型（津巴布韦使用BS 1363 13 A及圆脚插头）须适配本地安装。核心技术要求与IEC一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、机械强度、接地连续性及标识。
summary.zht: 供應辛巴威市場的家用製冷器具應滿足IEC 60335系列的電氣安全要求——IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）須與IEC 60335-1（通用要求）結合使用。辛巴威標準協會（SAZ）為國家標準機構，制定ZWS標準，通常採用或對齊IEC及南非SANS標準（SANS 60335系列與IEC 60335一致）。符合性通過SAZ合格評定/產品檢測證明，受監管的進口產品在清關前可能須接受進口符合性檢驗。器具須按本地230 V單相、50 Hz供電額定；銘牌、接地方式及插頭/插座類型（辛巴威使用BS 1363 13 A及圓腳插頭）須適配本地安裝。核心技術要求與IEC一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、機械強度、接地連續性及標識。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted/aligned as ZWS via SAZ; commonly mirrored by SANS 60335-2-24)
IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 1: General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — national standards body developing ZWS standards and providing product certification / conformity assessment
Local supply: 230 V single-phase, 50 Hz; plug/socket BS 1363 (13 A) and round-pin types

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporating Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. Because both China and Zimbabwe ultimately trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the technical baseline is similar, but CCC certificates and Chinese-laboratory GB test reports are not automatically accepted by SAZ conformity assessment or Zimbabwe import inspection.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于中国与津巴布韦最终均追溯至IEC 60335-2-24，技术基线相似，但CCC证书及中国实验室出具的GB检测报告不被SAZ合格评定或津巴布韦进口检验自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於中國與辛巴威最終均追溯至IEC 60335-2-24，技術基線相似，但CCC證書及中國實驗室出具的GB檢測報告不被SAZ合格評定或辛巴威進口檢驗自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both regimes derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the underlying safety requirements are closely aligned, so the gap is primarily procedural and configuration-related rather than fundamental: (1) Acceptance route — SAZ conformity assessment / Zimbabwe import inspection does not automatically accept Chinese CCC certificates or GB test reports; an IECEE CB Scheme test report (IEC 60335-2-24 basis with a CB certificate) issued by an IECEE NCB is generally the most portable evidence and is more readily recognised than a GB-only report. (2) Supply configuration — appliances must be confirmed for 230 V / 50 Hz operation; while 50 Hz matches China, the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V, so rating-plate voltage and voltage-tolerance verification is needed. (3) Plug/socket and earthing — Zimbabwe uses BS 1363 and round-pin outlets, differing from Chinese GB plug types; cord-and-plug or installation arrangements must suit local sockets and earthing practice. Exporters should confirm with SAZ and the in-country importer which standard edition and conformity-assessment route currently apply.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底层安全要求高度对齐，因此差距主要为程序性及配置性，而非根本性：（1）接受路径——SAZ合格评定/津巴布韦进口检验不自动接受中国CCC证书或GB检测报告；由IECEE NCB出具的IECEE CB体系检测报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24并附CB证书）通常是最具可移植性的证据，比仅有GB的报告更易获认可。（2）供电配置——须确认器具按230 V / 50 Hz运行；虽然50 Hz与中国相同，但额定电压与中国220 V不同，须核实铭牌电压及电压容差。（3）插头/插座及接地——津巴布韦使用BS 1363及圆脚插座，与中国GB插头类型不同；电源线及安装方式须适配本地插座及接地习惯。出口商应向SAZ及境内进口商确认当前适用的标准版本及合格评定路径。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底層安全要求高度對齊，因此差距主要為程序性及配置性，而非根本性：（1）接受路徑——SAZ合格評定/辛巴威進口檢驗不自動接受中國CCC證書或GB檢測報告；由IECEE NCB出具的IECEE CB體系檢測報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24並附CB證書）通常是最具可移植性的證據，比僅有GB的報告更易獲認可。（2）供電配置——須確認器具按230 V / 50 Hz運行；雖然50 Hz與中國相同，但額定電壓與中國220 V不同，須核實銘牌電壓及電壓容差。（3）插頭/插座及接地——辛巴威使用BS 1363及圓腳插座，與中國GB插頭類型不同；電源線及安裝方式須適配本地插座及接地習慣。出口商應向SAZ及境內進口商確認當前適用的標準版本及合格評定路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Expected/regulated — electrical safety to IEC 60335-2-24 (adopted as ZWS via SAZ; aligned with SANS) is the recognised baseline; demonstrated via SAZ conformity assessment / product testing and may be subject to Zimbabwe import conformity inspection. Exact mandatory scope should be confirmed with SAZ.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Household refrigerator electrical safety for Zimbabwe should be demonstrated against IEC 60335-2-24 (ZWS via SAZ, aligned with SANS), read with IEC 60335-1. Chinese CCC / GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically accepted; an IECEE CB Scheme report (IEC 60335-2-24) plus SAZ conformity assessment is the most portable route. Confirm 230 V / 50 Hz rating, plug/socket type, and import-inspection requirements with SAZ and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 家用电冰箱进入津巴布韦的电气安全应依据IEC 60335-2-24（经SAZ采用的ZWS，与SANS对齐）并配合IEC 60335-1证明。中国CCC / GB 4706.13认证不被自动接受；IECEE CB体系报告（IEC 60335-2-24）加SAZ合格评定是最具可移植性的路径。须向SAZ及境内进口商确认230 V / 50 Hz额定、插头/插座类型及进口检验要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 家用電冰箱進入辛巴威的電氣安全應依據IEC 60335-2-24（經SAZ採用的ZWS，與SANS對齊）並配合IEC 60335-1證明。中國CCC / GB 4706.13認證不被自動接受；IECEE CB體系報告（IEC 60335-2-24）加SAZ合格評定是最具可移植性的路徑。須向SAZ及境內進口商確認230 V / 50 Hz額定、插頭/插座類型及進口檢驗要求。
